Orpheus is a figure from ancient Greek mythology. He was a musician, poet and prophet known for his extraordinary musical talents. According to a myth, Orpheus was the son of Apollo and Calipi, one of the muses. The model that has been named as Orpheus in this context is trying to mimic human level sound. It is one of the few models that have produced real quality human level voice. This new model or 3 billion fine-tuned version is designed for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation and it is based on llama architecture.

orpheus is a new model designed for high-quality, empathetic text-to-speech generation. It has been fine-tuned to deliver human level speech synthesis that achieves exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. It can clone voices without prior fine-tuning, control speech and emotion characteristics with simple text, and has low latency (under 200 milliseconds). The model is based on the llama architecture.

In this video, we are going to install it locally and then see how it works. This model has been designed for high-quality empathetic text-to-speech generation and is based on the llama architecture. The model has been fine-tuned to deliver human level speech synthesis that achieves exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. We can clone voices without prior fine-tuning, control speech and emotion characteristics with simple text, and it has got very low latency (sub 200 millisecond streaming latency for real-time applications). The prerequisites are creating a virtual environment, installing audio libraries like torch, torch audio, transformers, and few other tidbits. After the prerequisites are done, we need to clone the repo of Orpheus, log into hugging face and accept the terms and conditions of this model as it is a gated model. Then we can download the model, run the model, and generate audio using the code provided.

Fad Miraza is demonstrating a new model named Orpheus, which is a high-quality, empathetic text-to-speech (TTS) generator designed for real-time streaming performance. The model has been fine-tuned to deliver human level speech synthesis with exceptional clarity and expressiveness. It can clone voices without prior fine-tuning and control speech and emotion characteristics with simple text. The model is based on llama architecture. In this video, Fad will show how to install it locally and demonstrate its capabilities.

According to a myth, Orpheus was the son of Apollo and Calipi, one of the muses. The model that has been named as Orpheus in this context is trying to mimic human level sound. orpheus is a new model designed for high-quality, empathetic text-to-speech generation. It has been fine-tuned to deliver human level speech synthesis that achieves exceptional clarity, expressiveness, and real-time streaming performance. It can clone voices without prior fine-tuning, control speech and emotion characteristics with simple text, and has low latency (under 200 milliseconds).
